description: The AI turn summary is no longer a floating right-side popup (it overlapped the existing menus and re-appeared on every AI pause), and the real-time AI action overlay no longer duplicates the game log in human-vs-AI play. Configures P2 as an AI at Hard, drives a live Movement phase, and asserts: (a) no AITurnSummaryPanel node exists under Main, (b) the AIActionLogOverlay stays hidden throughout the AI's turn (spectator-only now), and (c) the AI's actions AND reasoning are written to the game log (GameEventLog) — so everything the popup used to show is preserved in one place. Screenshots show the game log populated with the AI's turn and no floating overlay on the right.
